chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 267 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1341/2020 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 23-09-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner submits that this Petition has now become infructuous, therefore under instructions does not press the same. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
